dict.string: ZeroDark uses the camera for LiDAR scanning and visual identification.
ZeroDark uses the microphone for voice synthesis and acoustic communications.
ZeroDark uses health data to learn activity and sleep patterns for personalized recommendations.
ZeroDark may write health data to support activity tracking features.
ZeroDark uses location for mapping and navigation.
ZeroDark uses location for tracking and emergency services.
ZeroDark uses Bluetooth for mesh networking and LoRa communication.
ZeroDark uses local network for peer-to-peer mesh communication.
